response.justification: While Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with 20 years of strong full-stack engineering work and demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, he lacks the critical requirement of demonstrated AI/ML product expertise. His AI exposure is limited to recent infrastructure work (2 months at re:cinq with MCP frameworks), insufficient for a director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI Strategy that requires recognized expertise in building AI-powered products or platforms.
strengths: 20 years of progressive engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—exceeds minimum requirement
Proven entrepreneurial capability: founded and sustained GISCollective for 10 years as specialized geo-data platform
Strong thought leadership and teaching track record (workshops, conference talks, refactoring dojos) demonstrates ability to inspire others
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product or platform development—core requirement for AI Strategy role; current AI work (2 months) is infrastructure-focused, not strategic
Lacks preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML-related field; no formal advanced training in AI domain
Career is primarily infrastructure and full-stack IC work, not director-level strategic advisory or customer influence on emerging tech adoption
